title: R2-SPEC: DESIGN.md not updated for U+FEFF addition
description: The implementation now strips U+FEFF in addition to the spec-mandated U+200B, U+200C, U+2060. However, DESIGN.md §Display Name Canonicalization still lists only the original three characters. This creates a documentation/spec mismatch. DESIGN.md is marked as load-bearing in CLAUDE.md — it must accurately reflect the implementation.
